title: Incremental and bounded-parallel call-graph generation
goal: Avoid unconditional full-repository parsing by adding hash-bound file reuse and bounded parallel parsing while proving equivalence to a clean full rebuild.

acceptance.assertion: Changed, added, deleted, renamed and parser-version-affected files are deterministically invalidated; reused records retain source-content and producer-version bindings.
Full, incremental and bounded-parallel builds produce byte-equivalent canonical call ordering and identical diagnostics for the same repository state.
Worker count, memory budget and fallback behavior are explicit and deterministic; unsupported environments fall back to the proven serial path without partial artifacts.
Representative cold and small-delta benchmarks justify retaining each optimization and report regressions as well as wins.

metadata.source_request: Post-merge reviews for Lenskit PR #1018 were live-verified; confirmed optimization work is registered separately from the corrective follow-up.

bureau_always_open_scope.reason: Keep Bureau intake and unrelated registry writes available while Lenskit implementation runs in an isolated worktree.
